reviews.review_title: Good game but could easily be better
reviews.review_description: You should add real matches so we can play games and make the rink bigger like in practice map but a whole map. Still bugs you should make it optional to use a ai goalie in public. You should make the private lobbies a one time payment like 3-10 dollars or free. I would buy private lobbies if it was a one time payment. Overall its the only free game on meta yet and its still pretty good. (Please make the normal stick breakable and flexible like irl

I have been playing your game for 3 years waiting for private servers to be if you buy it you keep it forever or just make them free it would be way better for leagues and make it so you can add friends please consider it would be great (im trying to make a league and it would be 10 times easier to do)

this game is overall such a fun experience. now and then there are bugs and lags that come up. they updated very frequently which is great. in my opinion,some things could be better like goalie pad movement in multiplayer or privates. i know they have goalie pad movement in single player but hopefully they can add it to multiplayer. Also maybe there could be a thing that the refs don't have to use their stick to spawn the puck. overall i love this game keep up the good work

reviews.review_title: This is a good game but
reviews.review_description: You need to fix the puck
It is fun and has skaters and goalies but for goalies they should add full body tracking

One of my favourite games on the VR. I’ve played it since late 2023 and I still love it. The only problem that this doesn’t get it a five star is that it has pretty bad puck physics. often when the goalie saves it everyone in the lobby sees that it goes in the net but for the goalie it clearly isn’t in. To make the game even better, they should add a bigger stadium kinda like an NHL Stadium with lots of fans and make the puck physics even better. Overall this game is amazing just wanted to say this to make the game even better than it already is.

There's some people saying it's "hard to stick handle and shoot" but I just think they are bad. It only took me about a week to get used to it and it's pretty easy.

There also is some glitches the developers should fix, like when you touch the net with your stick it gets stuck or when someone passes to you and it's goes through your stick because the puck is laggy.

Ignore the toxic people, they just try to get on your nerves..

Overall this is a pretty decent game and I enjoy playing it.
Pls make ps and real games so we can actually play with friends and play the game

this would be five stars if it would let me join cuz this game was really fun when i was able to play it but now it just doesn't let me join every time i load it up it like kicks me up or like closes right as soon as i open it
I love it. I just hate the lag, but I think you should add some stuff like making your own custom hockey equipment and making them realistic and also I love hockey and the game
If there were locker rooms in public lobbies it would make it cooler

I think it would be really good if we had career mode and the devs need to fix the bugs and glitches because when i play a game in public lobbies i get the puck then it phases through my stick but overall the game is good so i give it 4 stars
Very good physics now. Just remove the saint pat's jerseys please
Game is really good but the sticks and pucks are super laggy.
Very peak game w updates and best free vr game oat very underrated game
It is a good game ngl but I tried it and played goalie and I was lagging so bad I could not leave or play it at all
It used to be really scary to try and be a goalie, but I can train on goals and train my stick handling and all that to try and make me better ￼

The game is definitely really worth getting, I mean it’s free and there’s Multiplayer, it’s pretty fun but there are few things that are annoying. Firstly, when multiple people are hitting the puck sometimes it doesn’t even move, or is very delayed which ruins the flow of the game. Other than that some minor tweaks and you have a 5 star sports game

developer_response.body: Try not to spam Join button. This might help with the issue

If you like hockey and your bored this game is for you. You can play single player, do drills, could help you train and has multiplayer. In my opinion this is one of the best vr hockey games I have played

I was playing the game and for the first time and it is good for people that play net but for players no! the stick hanging sucks, it is hard to shoot, and it sucks. do not get this game. It will just take up space.
so bad the hokey sticks are left handed even tho its free it still sucks

This is a good game. I love it. I play this game every single day I fight people I love it. Five stars.

I like this game for the goalie practice but my only issues with it is in goalie mode sometimes the puck will phase through my gear, not sure if its a skill issue or a glitch but still a 4/5 star game for now.
It's a great idea but it has no organization or real matches for people who actually want to play hockey instead of just playing with sticks and rubber lumps.
Great

I was playing this game cause it had a good rating and I've watched many hockey games and want to play, I logged in to single player, the goalie was twitching, then in the crowd there were two creepy low poly NCPs the physics can glitch a little but you'll get the hang of it, but good overall, just got jumpscared😂
Would be a 5 but I wanna compete without paying 5 dollars a month im not rich
It's a great game but we need more updates 🤌🏼
I keep spinning when i am trying to play and i cant shoot because of this it gives me motion sickness and frustration it is so annoying..  PLEASE FIX YOUR GAME!!!
So far so good. My kids have been able to figure it out. Hope the this game will get an update for stick dangling like the over expensive sensory arena game.
It’s just so good nothing to say
Would say if starting ask for advice from other players. It takes time to learn
Produce more leafs fans 👍

Okay so the game is great, really immersive but I have few problems with it few are about the goalkeeper. The glove is halfway noclipable, meaning the puck goes straight through, the second problem is with the legs for the goalkeeper, you make a save but it goes above your padding and through your legs and you get a goal, next thing is that the goal itself is noclipable through. Yeah but the game is really great and I really recommend it and I hope that the developers don't give up on this game and give us more updates.
I hope they make the glove for goaile have physics
As a goalie I find it annoying sometimes that the puck can go through your leg pads and your stick but great game overall.

reviews.review_title: How do you do goalie single player?
reviews.review_description: The game is amazing but I give it 3 stars because as s hockey goalie I got it to train being a goalie but I don't know how to train single player as a goalie and I don't even know if you can? Someone please help

developer_response.body: You need to select other game modes on the locker in the locker rooms. Select the one with the goalie helmet on it. Put a helmet on your head, click the door and after load press B to initiate play

reviews.review_title: This game is amazing and I'm not bot
reviews.review_description: I like it because I'm getting into hockey
It’s a tea fun game but you do have some toxic people and you should add penalties or a way who could check or trip or steal. A really fun and relaxing game

reviews.review_title: It’s great for me as a young hockey play
reviews.review_description: I like this so much but I wish it would have a private match with ai
Get this game now it is sooooo fun but there’s is some glitches but overall it’s a great game and I love it so much and I really enjoyed playing with my friends

The rubberbanding of the puck normally have it on my stick on a break away then I technically get hooked and the other team has the puck going the other way passing is also apart of this as well as it’s a 50/50 chance of you catching the puck on the stick or it goes through overall if you just want a fun hockey game to play and don’t care about the little issues I do recommend it
It is a great game I would recommend it for hockey fans, there is a bad part about it which is when your on it for too long it make you a little sick, but overall it is a great game.

developer_response.body: Thank you very much, unfortunately any game that has moving will make you dizzy. But you still can play goalie, they are way more stationary
